info.description: E-commerce REST API with products, categories, orders, users, and inventory management
info.title: Bey API

get.description: Retrieves a list of all categories
Retrieves a category by its slug
Retrieves a category by its ID
Retrieves an image by its ID
Retrieves inventory for a specific product

put.description: Updates inventory quantity for a product

post.description: Reserves inventory quantity for a product

get.description: Retrieves a list of all orders

post.description: Creates a new order (async or sync based on configuration)

get.description: Retrieves the status of an async order processing task
Retrieves an order by its ID

put.description: Updates the status of an existing order

get.description: Retrieves a list of products with optional pagination and filtering
Retrieves a product by its slug
Retrieves a product by its ID
Retrieves all images for a specific product

post.description: Creates a new image for a product

put.description: Sets a product image as the main image

get.description: Retrieves all variants for a specific product

post.description: Creates a new variant for a product

get.description: Retrieves a list of all users
Retrieves a user by their ID
Retrieves a variant by its ID

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
